message.content:
@startuml
participant JCallGraph as JCallGraph
participant CliManager as CliManager
participant MethodCallsList as MethodCallsList
participant CalledFromList as CalledFromList
participant File as File
participant JarFile as JarFile
participant ZipEntry as ZipEntry
participant ClassParser as ClassParser
participant ClassVisitor as ClassVisitor
participant Runner as Runner

JCallGraph ..> CliManager : new CliManager()
JCallGraph ..> CliManager : main(args)

JCallGraph ..> MethodCallsList : getMethodCallsList()
MethodCallsList ..> JCallGraph : MethodCallsList

JCallGraph ..> File : new File
File ..> JCallGraph : File

JCallGraph ..> JarFile : new JarFile(File)
JarFile ..> JCallGraph : JarFile

JCallGraph ..> ZipEntry : enumerationAsStream(Enumeration<T> e)
ZipEntry ..> JCallGraph : Jar en formato stream

loop [forEach]
    alt [isDirectory() and getName().endsWith(".class")]
        new ClassParser(String, String)
        ClassParser ..> JCallGraph : cp = ClassParser
        JCallGraph ..> ClassParser : getClassVisitor()
        ClassParser ..> JCallGraph : apply(ClassParser)
        JCallGraph ..> ClassVisitor : start()
        ClassVisitor ..> JCallGraph : HashMap<MethodReport, List<MethodReport>>
        alt [!= null]
            add(HashMap<MethodReport, List<MethodReport>>)
        end
    end
end

JCallGraph ..> Runner : main(String[])
JCallGraph ..> CliManager : exportFiles()
JCallGraph ..> CliManager : printStackTrace()

@enduml
